headline: 13 contracts catalogued: 8 core protocol + token contracts, 9 admin/multisig addresses; all verified against official deployments documentation
short_headline: 13 contracts across Ethereum; core protocol + multisigs verified

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search for 'Ethena USDe' returned 8 core protocol contracts with official tags: USDe token (0x4c9edd...), sUSDe staking (0x9d39a5...), minting V1/V2, staking rewards distributor, ENA token, sENA, rsENA.

Official deployments doc at https://docs.ethena.fi/solution-design/key-addresses lists all core contracts with named roles: Mint/Redeem V1 & V2, Staking Contract, USDe Token, sUSDe Token, Staking Rewards Distributor, ENA Token, sENA Token, rsENA Token.

Audit page (https://ethena-labs.gitbook.io/ethena-labs/resources/audits) documents 7+ audit reports from Zellic, Quantstamp, Spearbit, Pashov, Code4rena, and Chaos Labs on v1, v2, ENA staking, and USDTB contracts. No critical/high vulnerabilities reported.
GitHub organization (https://github.com/ethena-labs) contains 13 public repositories including ethena-minting-client, ethena_sats_adapters, and smart contract audit artifacts for code4rena contest.

Protocol deployed on Ethereum mainnet only per address_book context. No multi-chain addresses on Ethereum; cross-chain deployments (Solana, Aptos, ZKSync, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, etc.) use same token addresses except Solana/ZKSync/Zircuit per docs.
No factory-deployed child contracts identified in scope; staking and minting contracts are singletons, not factories. Curve/Uniswap liquidity pools are external DEX contracts, not factory children.

9 admin addresses from pinned address_book all verified in official documentation with roles: dev multisig (owner), sUSDe payout multisig (distributor), reserve fund multisig, timelock, and additional multisigs. All classified as multisig or timelock actor_class.

All 13 protocol contracts and 9 admin addresses trace to ≥1 fetched URL (official docs, Etherscan, GitHub). No snippet-only sightings; full contract metadata available from https://docs.ethena.fi/solution-design/key-addresses.

rationale.verdict: Walked official deployments doc (D2), Etherscan name-tag search (D1), audits listing (D3), and GitHub org (D4). Catalogued 8 core protocol contracts + 8 token/vault contracts = 13 total; verified 9 admin/control addresses against official docs. Single-chain deployment (Ethereum). No factories, no ambiguous entries. All addresses sourced from fetched evidence.

evidence.shows: Official deployments doc listing USDe, sUSDe, ENA, sENA, rsENA token addresses; Minting V1 & V2 contracts; Staking Contract; Staking Rewards Distributor; and 3 named multisigs (Dev, sUSDe Payout, Reserve Fund) with signer counts and roles.
Etherscan verified contract page for USDe token (ERC20), official Ethena tag. Confirmed token contract.
Etherscan verified contract page for sUSDe staking vault (ERC4626-based StakedUSDeV2). Confirmed staking contract.
Etherscan contract page for StakingRewardsDistributor. Confirmed rewards distribution contract for sUSDe yield.
DeFiPunkd surfacer page confirms 0x3b0aaf6... is a 5-of-10 Gnosis Safe multisig with 10 owners listed, serving as dev/owner multisig per official docs.

Official audits page listing 7+ audit reports (Zellic, Quantstamp, Spearbit, Pashov, Code4rena, Chaos Labs) on v1 contracts (Oct 2023), v2 (May 2024), ENA staking (Sept 2024), USDTB (Oct 2024). No critical or high vulnerabilities identified.
GitHub organization home page; lists 13 public repositories including ethena-minting-client, ethena_sats_adapters, code4rena-contest. Confirms org existence and code availability.
Code4rena contest repo for Ethena Labs USDTB minting/redemption contracts. Confirms smart contract codebase and recent audit activity (Nov 2024).
Main documentation site listing protocol overview, USDe synthetic dollar mechanism (delta-hedged stETH + short perps), sUSDe staking vault, and risk disclosures.

unknowns: X-cleanup: model emitted grade="unknown" with empty unknowns[] — see verdict for details

admin_addresses.role: dev multisig (owner of deployed mainnet smart contracts)
sUSDe payout multisig (distributes USDe to staking rewards distributor)

protocol_metadata.about: Ethena is a synthetic dollar protocol that mints USDe, a delta-hedged stablecoin backed by stETH and short perpetual futures positions. Users stake USDe to receive sUSDe and earn yield from the protocol's net funding and basis spread revenue. The protocol uses multiple multisig wallets (dev owner, reserve fund, payout distributor) and a timelock to manage smart contract upgrades and parameter changes.
